decisions.name: Is_Original_Award_the_same_as_Current_Award

decisions.name: Measure_Records_from_Change_Control_Record_Found
decisions.label: Measure Records from Change Control Record Found?

Flow.description: Flow runs when a Change Control Request Record "Award" type is created, it then creates a Change Control Tracker record with the record type "Pending Change Request".
Flow.interviewLabel: GMS - Create Change Control Tracker Record from {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GMS - Create Change Control Tracker Record

loops.name: Loop_through_Measures_from_change_control
loops.label: Loop through Measures from change control
